Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Awarding Attorney Fees To Pltf As Prevailing Party In This Action
Off Calendar Dec-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Paul J. Dion, Esq. of JONES, BOTHWELL & DION 951-8900, appearing for plaintiff/moving party California Pacific Medical Center
John R. Wallace, Esq. of JACKSON & WALLACE 982-6300, appearing for defendant/opposing party Dr. Richard Rider

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court ruled as follows -- PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER's Motion For Order Awarding Attorney Fees To Pltf As Prevailing Party In This Action - granted in the amount of $10,000 plus costs. (301/AJR/DS) JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR# 8620

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
For plaintiff California Pacific Medical Center, Paul J. Dion, Esq. JONES BOTHWELL & DION, 44 Montgomery Street, Suite 610, San Francisco, CA 94104-4608. 415-951-8900
For defendant Richard Rider, John R. Wallace, Esq., JACKSON & WALLACE, 55 Francisco Street, 6th Floor, San Francisco, CA 94133, 415-982-6300

Ruling:
Plaintiff California Pacific Medical Center's motion for summary judgment was argued and taken under submission. Plaintiff gave a proposed order to the Court. Defendant to submit proposed oreder by noon on October 21, 2005. Reported by Christina Paxton, CSR #1558 (301/JLW/CK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2005 Continued To Oct-18-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
